transcript: Speaker A: Rahul, project delay client-nod explain cheyyamo? [Rahul, can you explain the project delay to the client?] Speaker B: Yeah... actually delay happened because... our backend was... doing some technical issue. Speaker A: I'm sorry. Doing some technical issue? Speaker B: Problem ente project-il alla... English-il aayirunnu. [The problem wasn't with my project... it was with my English.] Appol njan random grammar videos kaanal nirthiyitt SpeakX use cheyyaan thudangiyath. [That's when I stopped watching random grammar videos and started using SpeakX.] Ee AI coach undallo, ningal parayunnath ellaam instantly improve cheyyum. [This AI coach, you know, will instantly improve everything you say.] Verum grammar mathram alla, real professional English. [Not just grammar, real professional English.] Ithil real office situations-nu vendi practice cheyyaan pattum. [In this, you can practice for real office situations.] Athayathu actual life-il samsarikkenda athe conversations cheyyaan pattum. [Meaning, you can have the exact same conversations you need to speak in actual life.] Pinne best part enthaannu ariyo? Aarum judge cheyyilla. [And do you know what the best part is? No one will judge you.] Speaker A: Rahul, can you explain the project delay to the client? Speaker B: Yes. The delay happened due to a backend integration issue, but our team is already resolving it. English padikkaan mathramalla, samsarikkaan practice venam. [To learn English, you don't just need to study, you need practice to speak.] First 20 questions free aanu. [First 20 questions are free.] Ippol thanne SpeakX try cheyyoo. [Try SpeakX right now.]

summary: A professional struggles to explain a project delay to his client due to poor English communication skills. He switches from watching random grammar videos to practicing with the SpeakX AI coach, which simulates real office scenarios. After practicing, he confidently explains the issue to his client, demonstrating the app's effectiveness.
